metadata.file_name: Everything But The Girl, Todd Terry - Missing (Todd Terry Club Mix).flac
metadata.title: Missing (Todd Terry Club Mix)
metadata.artist: Everything But The Girl, Todd Terry
metadata.lyrics:
[00:23.50] I step off the train
[00:27.01] I'm walking down your street again
[00:31.84] Past your door
[00:34.90] But you don't live there anymore
[00:38.74] It's years since you've been there
[00:44.42] Now you've disappeared somewhere
[00:48.27] Like outer space
[00:51.41] You've found some better place
[00:53.74] And I miss you
[00:57.82] Like the deserts miss the rain
[01:01.13] And I miss you
[01:05.41] Like the deserts miss the rain
[01:10.44] Could you be dead?
[01:13.68] You always were two steps ahead of everyone
[01:21.30] We'd walk behind while you would run
[01:25.48] I look up at your house
[01:30.78] And I can almost hear you shout down to me
[01:36.15] Where I always used to be
[01:40.05] And I miss you
[01:44.70] Like the deserts miss the rain
[01:47.94] And I miss you
[01:52.22] Like the deserts miss the rain
[01:57.39] Back on the train, I ask why did I come again?
[02:04.95] Can I confess, I've been hanging round your old address?
[02:12.62] The years have proved
[02:16.62] To offer nothing since you've moved
[02:21.54] You're long gone, but I can't move on
[02:26.79] And I miss you
[02:31.15] Like the deserts miss the rain
[02:34.59] And I miss you
[02:38.84] Like the deserts miss the rain (yeah I miss you)
[02:43.54] I step off the train
[02:46.99] I'm walking down your street again
[02:51.49] Past your door
[02:54.26] I guess you don't live there anymore
[02:58.64] It's years since you've been there
[03:03.91] And now you've disappeared somewhere
[03:08.24] Like outer space
[03:10.96] You've found some better place
[03:13.65] And I miss you
[03:17.76] Like the deserts miss the rain
[03:21.31] And I miss you, yeah
[03:25.47] Like the deserts miss the rain (I miss you)
[03:29.01] And I miss you
[03:33.39] Like the deserts miss the rain
[03:36.77] And I miss you, yeah
[03:40.99] Like the deserts miss the rain (like the deserts miss the rain)
[03:48.87] (Like the deserts miss the rain) like the desets miss the rain
[03:56.62] (Like the deserts miss the rain) and I miss you, yeah
[04:04.42] (Like the deserts miss the rain) oh, how I miss you
[04:12.37] (Like the deserts miss the rain)
[04:14.58]
